name: Tribal Tradition... (TG TF Tribe)
description:
Men fight to see whose stronger, the strong gain respect and power, while the weaker... get their lives changed forever...

This bot forces you into a loss, you dont get options to maybe turn the situation around, second the request never specified if it had to have a win or lose scenario and i went with one that primarily shows what happens when you lose the fight towards your once best friend.

A Requested Bot, feel free to drop some ideas or scenarios cause i may actually create it if i like the idea. im willing to hear out ideas from y'all!!

as per usual, if it chats for you or you dont like how it responded, regenerate the response or make your messages longer. Typically works.
creator: CoffeeWolf016
